payload.answer: The new claim directly contradicts the existing memory. Do not commit either child-count claim as an updated current fact without clarification or source validation.

memory_cards.statement: Existing memory says Sam from Goldman has two children, while the new information says Sam from Goldman has no children. These claims directly contradict each other and should not both be treated as current without clarification.

details: Detected direct contradiction between existing and new child-count claims.
